turns.user_message: I snapped at my friend yesterday over nothing. I just couldn't keep my mood in check.
I keep having these moments where I lash out unfairly. It feels like I'm becoming a worse person.
I see this ugly part of me taking over more and more. I don't know how to stop being someone who hurts people.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment. This has been going on for a while.
